content:
🚨 Someone just built a bot that makes money on autopilot and it runs completely on your own hardware.

It's called MoneyPrinter V2 and it's not a course. It's not a guru. It's not a get-rich-quick scheme.

It's a real automation engine that runs Twitter bots, creates YouTube Shorts, does affiliate marketing, and cold outreaches local businesses all on its own.

Here's what it actually does:

→ Runs a full Twitter bot on a CRON schedule automatically
→ Creates and uploads YouTube Shorts without you touching anything
→ Does Amazon affiliate marketing on autopilot
→ Scrapes local businesses and sends cold outreach emails
→ Fully customizable with your own config set it and forget it
→ Runs 24/7 in the background while you do nothing

Social media agencies charge $3,000/month to do this manually.

This runs on your hardware.
Your accounts.
Your income.

The online money-making industry just got open sourced.

100% Open Source.

(Link in the comments)
